title: 当前进展：从三层图谱走向服务化支撑
prompt:
Create a polished 16:9 Chinese leadership slide in the same visual family as slide_09 and slide_10: light background, formal executive technical style, clean structure, blue-green-orange restrained palette, high readability. Title: 当前进展：从三层图谱走向服务化支撑. Subtitle: 当前已形成样板闭环，下一步面向高频变更场景持续演进. No month labels, no timeline by month, no page number.

This slide must clearly show that the three-layer graph sits under the 服务层, not at the top. The architecture stack from top to bottom must be visually explicit:
1. Agent
2. SKILL
3. 服务层
4. 三层图谱
5. 数据层
Highlight 服务层 and 三层图谱 as the core project focus. Add one concise note near the stack: 构建配置知识底座，沉淀服务层接口，供 SKILL 调用，上层 Agent 组合 SKILL 完成配置生成、配置核查、方案生成等能力。

Recommended layout:
- Top or left-top: a vertical layered architecture stack with five layers, using blue for Agent, teal for SKILL, orange highlight for 服务层, green/blue for 三层图谱, gray for 数据层. Use arrows downward to show dependency.
- Main body center-left: 当前完成 as a structured progress tree.
- Main body center-right: 下一阶段 as a forward-evolution tree.
- Bottom: one strong takeaway strip.

Current progress section title: 当前完成
Use 3 progress blocks.

Block 1 title: 本体与建模已收敛出样板
Include:
- 已定义三层图谱对象 schema
- 基于业务感知完成首轮打样
- 已构建业务图谱这一层的定义

Block 2 title: 业务感知场景已完成两类图谱样板
Show this as a tree structure, visually explicit:
- 业务感知场景
  - 计费场景业务图谱
  - 带宽控制场景业务图谱
Add a small note: 已验证场景对象、特性分解、配置任务与命令映射可以按统一主链组织。

Block 3 title: 已支撑初步能力闭环
Include exactly these capability items:
- 配置生成
- 配置核查
Add one short note: 三层图谱已不仅是建模结果，而是开始支撑可调用能力。

Next-stage section title: 下一阶段
This must not be phrased as calendar phases. It must read as forward evolution of project scope.
Use 4 next-step blocks or one tree with 4 branches:
- 扩展高频变更场景
- 割接类场景
- 对接类场景
- 引入 MOP 脚本
Also include one serviceization branch:
- 构建服务层接口
- 为 SKILL 提供标准调用入口
- 支撑 Agent 按场景调用不同 SKILL
And one outcome branch:
- 配置生成
- 配置核查
- 方案生成

Important wording constraints:
- Do not say 几个月、阶段一、阶段二、阶段三.
- Do not make it a roadmap timeline.
- Do not overfocus on计费单案例.
- Emphasize this is evolving from graph construction to service-layer enablement.
- Clearly show 三层图谱位于服务层之下，数据层之上.

Bottom takeaway strip text:
当前工作已经完成三层图谱样板与能力验证，下一步将围绕高频变更场景与 MOP 脚本持续演进，并通过服务层为 SKILL 提供统一接口，形成 Agent 可调用的配置知识底座。
